top_signals.title: Stock Slide Extends on AI Jitters, Oil Above $100: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: A global selloff in technology stocks gained momentum as doubts over returns from billions of dollars spent on artificial intelligence were compounded by a surge in oil prices that rekindled inflation concerns.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
